channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Free-to-play dark fantasy turn-based RPG Void Hunters announced for PC, iOS, and Android
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Smartphone

Alpha test sign-ups now available.

Artifex Mundi has announced Void Hunters, a free-to-play dark fantasy turn-based RPG coming to PC via Steam and other storefronts, as well as iOS and Android with cross-play and cross-progression. Alpha test sign-ups are available now via the official Discord.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

In the wilds, where maps lead nowhere and law means nothing, the Void Hunters make their stand. Living on the outskirts of society, they hunt the world-devouring Void. In this dark fantasy, free-to-play, turn-based hero collector, all Hunters are fully realized characters with a place in this world, relationships to uncover, and distinct motivations that shape who they become.

Key Features

  • Build Your Squad of Hunters – Collect a diverse cast of Void Hunters and grow them your way. Level them up, upgrade skills, refine gear, and prepare a team that can handle what comes next.
  • Engage in Tactical Battles – Outthink brutal enemies with smart ability timing and careful decision-making in a combat system that rewards direct engagement.
  • Push Your Limits in Objective Challenges – Face uniquely challenging opponents and complete special battle objectives that push your tactics and your squad-building to the limit.
  • Master Roguelite-Based Missions – Test your Hunters in evolving missions where each attempt brings fresh choices and bonuses that reshape your squad’s power.
  • Climb the Rivalry Ranks – Compete for top scores and promotions to higher tiers battling against other squads in time-limited challenges.
  • Uncover the Void’s Truth – Investigate rising Void activity, track missing Hunters and survive escalating threats in the story campaign as tensions with the dogmatic religious Order rise.

Watch the announcement teaser trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Teaser Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/free-to-play-dark-fantasy-turn-based-rpg-void-hunters-announced-for-pc-ios-and-android
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core launches in Early Access on May 20
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Deep Rock Galactic roguelite spin-off dated.

Cooperative roguelite first-person shooter Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam on May 20, Ghost Ship Publishing and developer Ghost Ship Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Ghost Ship Publishing:

In Deep Rock Galactic: Rogue Core, Hoxxes IV has experienced a near-total shutdown, leaving countless mine sites cut off from the outside world. To secure the mining facilities amidst this mysterious Grayout, the Deep Rock Galactic Mining Corporation is deploying the Reclaimers—its elite force of dwarven security personnel—on a mission to reinstate the dig sites.

Players will take on the role of Reclaimers, adopting one of five playable classes: Guardian, Spotter, Falconer, Slicer, and Retcon, each with their own unique strengths and abilities. Bringing a core roguelite loop to the world of Hoxxes IV, Reclaimers start out with basic equipment, upgrading their gear, weapons, and abilities as they level up.

Amongst these include a Zipline launcher traversal tool, the Zhukov NUK17 submachine gun, and plenty of grenades, all ready at a moment’s notice to support Reclaimers as they take on the darkest depths of Hoxxes IV. Making this endeavour more dangerous than ever are new creatures lurking in the shadows, including the horrific Corespawn, Rafkan, and Shatterclaw species, which wait bloodthirsty and primed to attack.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/deep-rock-galactic-rogue-core-launches-in-early-access-on-may-20
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Project Shadowglass ‘Gameplay’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
Starhelm Studios has released the first gameplay trailer for Project Shadowglass, its “stealth-based immersive sim that meets dark fantasy RPG.” A demo will be available for PC via Steam in 2026.

Here is a brief overview of the game, via Starhelm Studios:

A stealth-based immersive sim that meets dark fantasy RPG. Roleplay as a rogue planning daring heists, infiltrating forbidden locales, and escaping with priceless artifacts. Features unique 3D pixelated graphics and lasting consequences where every action could leave a trail back to you. Inspired by old-school games like Thief, Deus Ex, and System Shock.

Watch the trailer below.

Gameplay Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/project-shadowglass-gameplay-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: MARVEL MaXimum Collection launches March 27
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Konami Marvel games collection dated.

MARVEL MaXimum Collection will launch digitally for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam on March 27, Limited Run Games announced. Physical edition pre-orders will be available via Limited Run Games from March 27 to May 24.

Here is an overview of the collection, via Limited Run Games:

About

Featuring six classic titles from the Arcade, 8-bit, and 16-bit consoles, MARVEL MaXimum Collection includes a host of fan favorites, each evoking the endless spirit, imagination, and non-stop action that made the originals so beloved for a generation of gamers.

MARVEL MaXimum Collection represents a comprehensive gathering of Marvel’s early gaming legacy, reborn for a modern gaming audience.

More than a mere game, MARVEL MaXimum Collection is one for the True Believers, a Super Hero-sized helping of history, taking gamers on a comprehensive tour of Marvel’s gaming legacy. Spanning multiple genres and a multitude of the world’s greatest heroes, gamers can experience every pixelated punch, web-swing, and optic blast across multiple platforms. Refusing to play favorites, MARVEL MaXimum Collection doesn’t just feature one version of a particular game; here, every major console and arcade iteration is included! Whether you grew up with a controller in your hand or a roll of quarters in your pocket, the MARVEL MaXimum Collection is the ultimate collection of comic book classics!

Included Games

  • X-Men: The Arcade Game (Arcade) – The definitive mutant beat ’em up returns! Experience the legendary cabinet action with full online multiplayer support for up to six players. Choose your favorite X-Man and take on Magneto’s army with the ultimate team-up experience.
  • Captain America and The Avengers (Arcade, SEGA Genesis / Mega Drive, Nintendo Entertainment System) – Take control of Captain America, Iron Man, Hawkeye, and Vision as you experience the cinematic arcade original or the unique platforming spin of the Nintendo Entertainment System.
  • Spider-Man/Venom: Maximum Carnage (Super Nintendo Entertainment System, SEGA Genesis / Mega Drive) – Based on the iconic comic crossover, gamers take to the streets of New York City battling hordes of nefarious bad guys, all to the sound of a rockin’ 16-bit soundtrack! Switch between the rich color palette of the Super Nintendo version, or dive in and enjoy the Genesis / Mega Drive version’s gritty vibe. Whatever you choose, carnage is guaranteed!
  • Venom/Spider-Man: Separation Anxiety (Super Nintendo Entertainment, SEGA Genesis / Mega Drive) – The superlative symbiote sequel! Go solo or team up in two-player cooperative play to take on the Life Foundation and Carnage’s offspring.
  • Spider-Man/X-Men: Arcade’s Revenge (Super Nintendo Entertainment System, SEGA Genesis / Mega Drive, Game Boy, Game Gear) – Navigate Arcade’s deadly “Murderworld.” This collection includes the handheld versions of the game, offering a fascinating look at Marvel’s history of on-the-go gaming.
  • Silver Surfer (Nintendo Entertainment System) – Test your Super Hero skills against one of the most infamously challenging shooters to ever grace a console! Featuring one of the greatest soundtracks in 8-bit history, this is a shooter that’s tough to master and tougher to put down!

Additional Features

  • Archives – Dive into a digital archive featuring high-resolution scans of original box art, instruction manuals, and vintage advertisements.
  • Music Player – Kick back and listen to the iconic chip-tune scores from every version of every game in the collection.
  • Rewind and Save States – Finally conquer the “Deadly Walls” of Silver Surfer or the boss gauntlets of Arcade’s Revenge with the ability to rewind gameplay and save anywhere.
  • Display Options – Play with crisp, modern pixels or recreate the Saturday morning experience with CRT and scanline filters.
  • Rollback netcode in X-Men: The Arcade Game.
  • Museum.
  • Cheat menus.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/marvel-maximum-collection-launches-march-27
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Anomaly President launches in Early Access on August 3
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Fast-paced roguelike action game dated.

Side-scrolling roguelike action game Anomaly President will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam on August 3, developer Phew Phew Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Anomaly President is here with its unique presidential roguelike gameplay where you can destroy your enemies in the craziest ways!

Take on the mission to overthrow a president pushing the world toward disaster. But fighting is not enough. To save the world, you must also run for presidency.

Deadly Warrior by Night, Presidential Candidate by Day

Lead a double life in a world of chaos and corruption. By day, you’re a presidential candidate, winning the hearts and minds of the people. By night, you transform into a vigilante warrior, using your weapons to take down the criminal gangs controlled by the current president.

In a world filled with anomalies, you will encounter various enemies and vice president bosses, each with their own unique anomaly power. For example, did you know the president’s PR chief has the power of HEART, making people fall in love with them?! The good news is, by defeating these bosses, you can acquire their anomaly powers!

You Can’t Become President by Yourself; You Need a Team

You need a trustworthy team to run campaigns and empower you on your path to presidency. Choosing the right team is crucial in Anomaly President! They’ll be the ones to help you win the race!

You Need a Base on Your Journey to Presidency

To combat hidden crime syndicates and also run your presidential campaign simultaneously, you need a base that moves with you. Enter the campaign bus!

Design your campaign bus to suit your style and needs! Start from scratch, add unique sections, and create a personalized mobile base for your campaign.

Choose Your Weapon and Anomaly Power!

Special anomaly upgrades you’ll encounter while fighting will shape your warrior identity. You can become a sword master who parries enemies at the right time or transform into a cyber mage dealing mass damage with anomaly powers. In Anomaly President, the choices are plenty!

The best part is, the roguelike structure lets you experiment with all options. Try out different powers and progress with the one that best suits your style! There are many ways to evolve in Anomaly President.

Anomaly President Wants You!

Travel the country, explore new horizons, win the people’s hearts, destroy the current president’s gangs, liberate the people from tyranny, and ultimately get your revenge!

Anomaly President is calling you to action!

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/anomaly-president-launches-in-early-access-on-august-3
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: First-person puzzle platformer Yerba Buena announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Starring an NPC in an abandoned gameworld.

Publisher Focus Entertainment and developer Mad About Pandas have announced Yerba Buena, a first-person puzzle platformer played from the perspective of an NPC in an abandoned gameworld. It will be available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Focus Entertainment:

About

The world is a game. Break the rules.

Step into a surreal puzzle platforming adventure as Barb, a young woman living as an NPC in an abandoned gameworld. When a sinister plot threatens your beloved San Francisco, you must step up to save it with the help of a mysterious and powerful device: the Oscillator.

Copy the movement and physical traits of the world around you, reapply them to manipulate the environment and solve inventive puzzles: give a table the bounce of a trampoline, send entire buildings across city blocks or turn solid walls into thin air!

Track down a dangerous biker gang and uncover the truth behind the glitch that threatens your world.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Dive into a unique video game world set in 1970’s San Francisco and save your city with the help of your friends and some unlikely allies.
  • Master a ground-breaking “Copy and Paste” mechanic that lets you apply the movement and physical traits of objects to manipulate the gameworld.
  • Unlock new Oscillator features as you go, and combine them to solve mind-bending environmental puzzles!
  • Discover the origins of the mysterious glitch that threatens your city, and become the main character of your own story.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/first-person-puzzle-platformer-yerba-buena-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Remothered: Red Nun’s Legacy announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher and developer Stormind Games, along with Soft Source Publishing, have announced Remothered: Red Nun’s Legacy, the third entry in the Remothered series following Remothered: Tormented Fathers and Remothered: Broken Porcelain. It will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via Stormind Games:

About

Sometimes, seeking the truth means losing yourself.

Thirteen months after six young girls vanished in Sicily, a new clue reopens the nightmare.

When a mysterious recording rekindles the hope that her daughter might still be alive, Susan, against all reason, decides to go to the place where everything seems to have begun: a decaying noble residence isolated on the slopes of Mount Etna and once owned by the Ashmann family.

What starts as a desperate search soon becomes a journey into terror, where family secrets, memory, and obsession intertwine. Susan finds herself drawn into a labyrinth of relentless stalkers, hidden symbols, and supernatural phenomena. As reality fractures and dark powers rise, every step brings her closer to the truth… and to a terror older than herself.

Created to captivate both newcomers and longtime fans of the Remothered saga, Red Nun’s Legacy blends classic survival horror, stealth, and psychological horror, introducing new mechanics centered on perception, hypnosis, and environmental manipulation.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Survive Horrific Stalkers – Challenge your survival instinct to get away from murderous enemies, hide and evade the deadly stalkers hunting you down, and fight back in critical moments.
  • A Homage to Old-School Horror – Feel the atmosphere of this heartfelt love letter to 3rd person survival horrors of the past.
  • Hypnosis Powers – Read objects to reveal forgotten memories, expose concealed passages, and reshape your understanding of the environment.
  • Explore a Richly Detailed Environment – Find clues and key items, and solve puzzles to access new areas and progress to the final revelation.
  • Uncover the Secrets of the Cristo Morente – Learn the forgotten story of the convent, the cradle where the myth of the Red Nun began.

Watch the announcement trailer and first developer diary below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Developer Diary #1: Reviving Remothered



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/remothered-red-nuns-legacy-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Aphelion launches April 28
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Physical edition due out on July 2.

Cinematic science-fiction third-person action adventure game Aphelion will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on April 28, developer DON’T NOD announced. It will also be available via Game Pass.

Aphelion will cost $29.99 / €29.99 on PC and $34.99 / €34.99 on consoles. Xbox Series and Steam users will also be able to take advantage of a 10 percent discount during the launch window.

A physical edition, dubbed the “Pioneer Edition,” will launch for PlayStation 5 on July 2, via distributor Maximum Entertainment.

Here is an overview of the game, via DON’T NOD:

About

Stranded on a frozen planet, astronaut Ariane must brave rugged landscapes and shifting realities to rescue her wounded partner, Thomas. This action-packed science-fiction adventure blends exploration, traversal, and tense stealth gameplay.

A Science-Fiction Action Adventure on the Edge of Our Solar System

By 2060, Earth will be uninhabitable. The discovery of a ninth planet—Persephone—at the edge of the solar system, is humanity’s best hope. The European Space Agency is dispatching the Hope 01 scientific mission, consisting of two of their accomplished astronauts, Ariane and Thomas. Their mission: to survey the planet and determine whether humanity can prosper anew here.

Your adventure begins in chaos, as the crash landing of their ship scatters them across the planet, launching them on a desperate quest to find one another.

Aphelion is a cinematic third-person action-adventure set on the planet Persephone, an uncharted, frozen world. Stranded and isolated, you must survive the truly unknown, find each other, and complete the mission. Traverse stunning alien landscapes, avoid lurking threats, and discover the haunting secrets buried beneath the ice.

Explore an Uncharted Planet

Explore the surreal beauty of Persephone, a vast frozen world shaped by deadly weather and ever-changing terrain.

Armed only with your explorational tools—pathfinder, oxygen tank, grappling hook, and more—you must face the unknown, traverse treacherous terrain, and gather clues about the strange, reality-bending phenomenon threatening your existence.

Find Each Other

Helpless on the edge of the solar system, the Hope 01 crew faces a brutal new world and the echoes of a complicated past. Ariane Montclair and Thomas Cross share a deep connection, a relationship left unresolved by the demands of their careers and their mission. Facing overwhelming odds, their fractured bond becomes a lifeline as they grasp in the dark for one another.

Hide to Survive

You’re not alone. Something lurks beneath the ice.

Key Features

  • A realistic depiction of space exploration.
  • An emotional drama on an alien world.
  • Cinematic action-adventure with gripping traversal gameplay.
  • Tools-based exploration and survival.
  • Tense and exciting stealth-based sequences.

Watch a new trailer below.

Persephone Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/aphelion-launches-april-28
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The 7th Guest Remake announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Vertigo Games and developer Exkee announced The 7th Guest Remake for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store). It will launch in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

The iconic game The 7th Guest has been brought back to life with modern technology, delivering an atmospheric story like no other.

Six guests have been welcomed to a foreboding mansion, but something sinister is at play. The wealthy recluse and toymaker Henry Stauf lurks in the shadows, and a dark power hangs over the house, shrouded in mystery. Who is the seventh guest? What does Henry want with them? And who will live to tell the tale?

As you explore the eerie mansion, the puzzles grow increasingly challenging, with dangers lurking around every corner. Every shadow, distant creak, and flicker of light builds tension as the house slowly reveals its secrets.

The 7th Guest is the ultimate mystery adventure for players who love mind-bending puzzles, haunting exploration, and a chilling story.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Cinematic Storytelling Through Volumetric Video – Step inside the story. Using cutting-edge, newly recorded volumetric video, live-action performances are captured in full 3D, placing you directly inside Henry Stauf’s mansion at the heart of the mystery. Real actors appear within the world itself, making every encounter feel immediate and unsettling.
  • Unique Mind-Bending Puzzle Gameplay – The equally beloved and feared haunted mansion comes alive around you with high-end visuals and carefully redesigned, all-new handcrafted puzzles. Every puzzle is woven into the story and rooted in the mansion’s lore, with recognizable elements that pay homage to the original.
  • Dynamic Environments – The haunted mansion shifts and transforms around you through high-end visuals and clever optical illusions. Investigate every creepy nook and cranny. Unlock new rooms, uncover hidden secrets, and keep your wits about you as the horrors within begin to close in.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/the-7th-guest-remake-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: We Gotta Go! launches April 14
item.content:encoded:
Cooperative horror comedy game We Gotta Go! will launch for PC via Steam on April 14, publisher Mad Mushroom and developer FuzzyBot announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

We Gotta Go! is a cooperative horror comedy that’ll scare the crap out of you—literally. Team up to reach the only bathroom in a haunted mansion before your bowels betray you. Scavenge for items, fend off ghosts, and fight through cursed halls together in a desperate hunt for sweet relief.

You and your friends are stuck in a haunted mansion and desperately need to find the bathroom. Your goal: navigate the haunted halls and survive ghostly encounters to reach the porcelain promised land to escape before your bowels betray you!

Key Features

  • Hold It Together – Fear, stress, and bad burritos all push your gut closer to disaster. Manage your bowels carefully – make better food choices, fart to relieve the pressure, and more, all before you become a pile of poo.
  • Survive the Supernatural – TP Mummies, turd mobs and a host of other horrors lurk in the darkness, waiting to scare your pants off. Literally.
  • Scavenge and Smash – Light up lanterns, wield wonky weapons, and fling fancy furniture to break open doors, solve haunted puzzles, and keep ghosts at bay (or just throw s#!t at your friends).
  • Customizable Crap – Scavenge clothes from corpses to mix up your style. Then die, and return as a playable poop, only to be reborn again with an even better fit.
  • Fresh Haunt Every Run – The procedurally generated mansion won’t make it easy: its many passages are blocked, locked, hidden, and haunted… Can your team survive and extract via the porcelain throne?

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/we-gotta-go-launches-april-14
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
